_comment: Adaptation measures catalog. capex_pct = capex as % of asset replacement value. opex_annual_pct = annual opex as % of capex. damage_reduction_pct = effectiveness against target hazard (0-100%). design_life_years = expected lifespan of measure.

measures.label: Temporary Flood Barriers
measures.description: Deployable flood barriers (sandbags, aqua dams) to exclude floodwater.

measures.label: Permanent Flood Barrier / Bund
measures.description: Permanent earthen or concrete bund / perimeter wall around asset.

measures.label: Elevated Foundation (Raise Floor Level)
measures.description: Raise floor level by 0.5–1.5m above flood plain. Most effective for new builds or major renovations.

measures.label: Structural Waterproofing
measures.description: Tanking, flood-proof doors/windows, water-resistant coatings to limit ingress.

measures.label: Sump Pump System
measures.description: Automatic sump pump with battery backup to remove groundwater infiltration.

measures.label: Permeable Paving & SuDS
measures.description: Permeable surfaces and sustainable drainage reduce surface water runoff.

measures.label: Roof Reinforcement
measures.description: Hurricane straps, additional fixings and reinforced roof-to-wall connections.

measures.label: Storm Shutters / Impact Glazing
measures.description: Impact-resistant shutters or glazing protects openings from wind-borne debris.

measures.label: Foundation Anchor Bolts
measures.description: Structural anchor bolts securing frame to foundation reduce uplift risk.

measures.label: Wind-Rated Glazing System
measures.description: High-performance curtain walling / glazing rated to design wind speeds.

measures.label: Ember-Resistant Vents
measures.description: Replace standard vents with 1/16" mesh ember-resistant vents to prevent interior ignition.

measures.label: Non-Combustible Cladding
measures.description: Replace combustible exterior materials with fire-resistant cladding (fibre cement, brick, stucco).

measures.label: Vegetation Clearance Zone
measures.description: Maintain 30m non-combustible buffer zone around structure; annual maintenance required.

measures.label: Exterior Sprinkler System
measures.description: Rooftop and perimeter sprinkler systems activated during wildfire events.

measures.label: Building Insulation Upgrade
measures.description: Improved wall, roof and floor insulation reduces cooling loads and thermal stress.

measures.label: Cool Roof Coating
measures.description: High-albedo roof coating or membrane reduces solar heat gain by 30–50%.

measures.label: High-Efficiency HVAC Upgrade
measures.description: Replace aging HVAC with high-COP heat pump system sized for future peak temperatures.

measures.label: Green Roof / Living Roof
measures.description: Vegetated roof reduces surface temperature by 2–8°C through evapotranspiration.

measures.label: External Shading Systems
measures.description: Brise soleil, external blinds or louvres reduce solar gain in glazed facades.
